# UiScene.Parse method

Decode a UI-scene SNO blob (the `Meta` bytes, including the 16-byte `SNOFileHeader`). Raw graph only; never throws on unknown fields — unrecognised type ids are surfaced as their raw hash so the contract stays lossless.

| blob | The full SNO `Meta` blob. |
